title: MMTier Tagger
description:
A tag/detector system designed to detect player tiers in MMTier.
Likely interacts with the MMTier API to check and display a player’s tier information.
Can be used in-game (like Minecraft) to show tier names, ranks, or other stats.
body:
A tag/detector _system_ designed to detect player **tiers** in **MMTier**.
That interacts with the **MMTier API** to check and display a player’s **tier** _information_.
That show **tier** names, **ranks**, or other **stats**.
It detect real-time indicator for players.
You can press O to enable and disable tier display.
